---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution
What should the tool / behavior look like? If you have a concrete API in mind, sketch it:

```
tool_name(param1, param2) → expected output
```

## Alternatives Considered
Other ways to solve this, and why they fall short.

## ClickUp API Reference
If this maps to a specific ClickUp API endpoint, link the docs:
https://developer.clickup.com/reference/

## Additional Context
Any extra detail — screenshots, related tools, similar projects.
